animation.init_id: DFS ready: showing cell IDs. Start: {{start}}, End: {{end}}
animation.init_dist: Initialize all distances to ∞, preparing for DFS
animation.start_settle: Start node {{start}} is settled in the Stack
animation.explore_some: Explore neighbors of {{curr}}, found unstacked nodes
animation.explore_none: Explore neighbors of {{curr}}, all neighbors already in stack or visited
animation.push_settle: Neighbor {{neighbor}} settled on top of the Stack
animation.grid_blocked: Start or End is blocked by a wall, cannot start

relatedProblems.695: DFS connected component area: recursively mark and accumulate area from each land cell, return the largest island
relatedProblems.79: Backtracking DFS: recursively spell words along four directions on a 2D board, using visited flags to prevent reuse
relatedProblems.130: Boundary DFS: mark regions reachable from the border O, then flip all remaining unmarked O to X
relatedProblems.417: Reverse DFS: flow uphill from both Pacific and Atlantic borders, take the intersection as the answer
relatedProblems.329: Memoized DFS: compute the longest increasing path from each cell, using a dp cache to avoid recomputation
